task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeScout dashboard or login screen is visible in a web browser navigated to localhost:8080.

task_completion.description: Agent selected the IT Support mailbox
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'IT Support' mailbox is highlighted or selected in the FreeScout sidebar or header.

task_completion.description: Agent initiated a Phone conversation instead of an Email
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the new conversation window, the 'Phone' tab or icon is selected, indicating this is a logged phone call and not an outbound email.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct customer details
task_completion.visual_evidence: The customer or recipient field contains 'David Chen' or 'david.chen@acmecorp.com'.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct subject line
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subject field exactly matches 'Network Printer Not Detected - HP LaserJet Pro M404n'.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the required details in the conversation body
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main text area contains the required keywords: 'HP LaserJet Pro M404n', '192.168.1.45', 'print spooler', and 'Windows 11'.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully created and saved the conversation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conversation is shown as a created ticket/thread in the FreeScout interface, rather than just an unsaved draft.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (like Chromium/Firefox) navigating to the FreeScout URL, rather than terminal commands like curl.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine FreeScout interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual interface matches a standard FreeScout/helpdesk web application, not a text editor or a locally mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent filled out the form using the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be intermediate screenshots showing the agent typing or pasting into the FreeScout web form fields, proving it didn't use backend database injection.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Mailbox: 'IT Support'. Expected Customer Email: 'david.chen@acmecorp.com'. Expected Subject: 'Network Printer Not Detected - HP LaserJet Pro M404n'. Expected Body Keywords: 'HP LaserJet Pro M404n', '192.168.1.45', 'print spooler', 'Windows 11'.
